intent: Cut the v0.2.2 release so the GitHub Marketplace listing publishes from a tag that carries the full current feature set + correct branding. Rolls the accumulated [Unreleased] CHANGELOG into [0.2.2] - 2026-07-09: turn-based REWORK/REVIEW verdicts + blocking-vs-advisory findings + convergent re-review (#41), the scoped shape pre-flight banner + `plumb check --review` (#39/#40), and the Marketplace launch polish (#43: action.yml Plumbline/target/blue branding, Why section, brand kit, sample capsule, documented proofgate back-compat). Version-only ceremony per RELEASING.md: bump package.json 0.2.1->0.2.2, roll the changelog, update compare links. No source/action/workflow/policy changes. The v0.2.2 tag is pushed after merge; the release workflow verifies tag==package.json and publishes notes from the [0.2.2] section.

validation_plan.reason: Repo still type-checks (release workflow runs it against the tag).
